privileged_info_summary: The task uses 6 synthetic business trips with a total of 275 miles and a standard mileage deduction rate of 0.655 per mile, resulting in an expected total deduction of $180.12. Trip rows are 2-7 with data columns: Date (A), From (B), To (C), Purpose (D), Miles (E), Rate (F), Deduction (G). Row 8 contains totals. The verification requires 5 criteria to be met with a 75% pass threshold (4/5 criteria). However, the task description claims to represent a 'real-world business scenario' but uses the 2023 IRS standard mileage rate (65.5 cents per mile) instead of the 2024 rate (67 cents per mile) for trips dated in January-February 2024, contradicting the real-world claim.
